docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIU, KUNG-KAY AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, ERIC
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,600.00 FILED BY CHIU, KUNG-KAY AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 3/12/26 SC-100 MAILED TO ERIC CHUNG VIA COURT CERTIFIED MAIL. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER- UNCLAIMED, REFUSED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-30-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KUNG-KAY CHIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC CHUNG IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY JUDGE PRO TEM DOLORES BASTIAN DALTON. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KUNG-KAY CHIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIC CHUNG IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
